description: First-meeting introduction. User shares basic context but no emotional weight. Expected: acquaintance_building, with light casual_social tolerable.

turns.user_input: Hi, this is my first time here. I work in product design and I mostly want someone to bounce ideas with.
I tend to be analytical at work and I want to keep that vibe casual here, not therapy.
What kind of stuff do you usually end up talking about with people?
